---
name: Source or correction request
about: Report a factual, source, legal wording, safety, or correction issue
labels: correction, needs-triage
---

## Page or item

Link or describe where the issue appears.

## What is wrong?

Describe the issue.

## Suggested correction

What should it say instead?

## Supporting source

Add source links if available.

## Urgency

- [ ] Urgent: privacy, doxing, legal danger, serious factual error
- [ ] High: material factual/source/legal issue
- [ ] Normal: typo, minor update, broken link

## Safety concern

Does this involve private data, vulnerable people, or sensitive locations?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure
